productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Brown Handbag
description: Style Note Add a twist to your attire by carrying this fashionable bag from united colors of benetton. Stuff your essentials in and you're ready to step out in style! Product Details Brown hand bag with a brand badge in front Has two short straps with buckled details in front Three main compartments, one with organiser sleeves and one with an internal zippered pocket Material and Care Outer: 100% polyurethane and lining: 100% polyester Use a clean, dry cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not bleach, wash, tumble dry, iron or dry clean Size Height: 23 cm Width: 32 cm Depth: 5 cm
